---
title: "Title of the third paper"
---

## Preface {.unnumbered}

::: {.contribution}
Briefly describe the candidate's contribution to this paper.
:::

State the publication status of the paper here.

## Abstract {.unnumbered}

\begin{quote}
\itshape
State the question, methods, principal findings, and contribution in 150--250 words.
\end{quote}

## Introduction

## Literature review

## Methodology

## Data

## Results

## Conclusions

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

## Appendices {.unnumbered}

### 4.A Supplementary material {.unnumbered}
